summary: SINGLE_FOCUS: ComplexPlane with 5 color-coded always_redraw root dots for z⁵ + (2s)·z - 1 = 0 (uses numpy.roots). ValueTracker s_tr sweeps 0→1; starting from 5th roots of unity, roots move to new locations; persistent trails via phantom-updater-driven history dict. Live panel shows current polynomial.
